recipes.title: Creamy Garlic Pasta
recipes.description: A quick creamy pasta with garlic, parmesan, and fresh herbs.
recipes.instructions: Boil the pasta. Gently cook the garlic, add cream and parmesan, then toss everything together.

recipes.title: Mediterranean Salad
recipes.description: Fresh vegetables, feta, olives, and a bright lemon dressing.
recipes.instructions: Chop the vegetables, add feta and olives, then dress with olive oil and lemon juice.

recipes.title: Chicken Vegetable Soup
recipes.description: A comforting homemade soup with chicken and seasonal vegetables.
recipes.instructions: Simmer chicken in stock, add chopped vegetables, and cook until tender.

recipes.title: Banana Oat Pancakes
recipes.description: Soft breakfast pancakes made with ripe banana and rolled oats.
recipes.instructions: Blend all ingredients into a batter and cook small pancakes on a lightly oiled pan.

recipes.title: Roasted Salmon
recipes.description: Tender oven-roasted salmon with lemon, garlic, and herbs.
recipes.instructions: Season the salmon and roast until flaky. Serve with lemon wedges.

recipes.title: Chocolate Berry Cake
recipes.description: A rich chocolate cake finished with fresh seasonal berries.
recipes.instructions: Mix the batter, bake until set, cool completely, and decorate with berries.

recipes.title: Beef Tacos
recipes.description: Spiced beef tacos with tomato, lettuce, and a creamy sauce.
recipes.instructions: Brown the beef with spices, warm the tortillas, and assemble the tacos.

recipes.title: Mushroom Risotto
recipes.description: Creamy risotto with sautéed mushrooms and parmesan cheese.
recipes.instructions: Toast the rice and gradually add hot stock. Fold in mushrooms and parmesan.

recipes.title: Tomato Bruschetta
recipes.description: Crisp toasted bread topped with tomatoes, garlic, and basil.
recipes.instructions: Toast sliced bread and top with the seasoned tomato mixture.

recipes.title: Green Smoothie
recipes.description: A refreshing smoothie with spinach, banana, and citrus.
recipes.instructions: Blend all ingredients until completely smooth and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Baked Chicken and Potatoes
recipes.description: Juicy baked chicken served with golden herb-roasted potatoes.
recipes.instructions: Season chicken and potatoes, arrange on a tray, and bake until golden.

recipes.title: Vegetable Curry
recipes.description: A warming vegetable curry in a fragrant coconut sauce.
recipes.instructions: Cook the vegetables with spices, add coconut milk, and simmer until tender.

recipes.title: Lemon Cheesecake
recipes.description: A smooth baked cheesecake with a bright lemon flavor.
recipes.instructions: Prepare the crust and filling, bake gently, then chill before serving.

recipes.title: Egg and Avocado Toast
recipes.description: Crunchy toast topped with avocado and a soft cooked egg.
recipes.instructions: Toast the bread, mash the avocado, and finish with a cooked egg.
